case_title: SINDY CHO VS. JULIEN ROUILLAC et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-25-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHO, SINDY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ROUILLAC, JULIEN ROUILLAC, NICHOLE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,300.00 FILED BY CHO, SINDY AS TO DEFENDANT ROUILLAC, JULIEN ROUILLAC, NICHOLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-25-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-25-2011 - DEPT. 506, JUDGE DON MITCHELL, CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANTS, MATTER WAS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. (NO EXHIBIT).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $59.50) SERVED JAN-19-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROUILLAC, JULIEN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $29.75) SERVED JAN-20-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ROUILLAC, NICHOLE
